remaining_params.SpellDescription: Exile target card from a graveyard.

params.Description: You may cast Dinosaur creature spells from among cards you own exiled with CARDNAME. If you cast a spell this way, that creature enters with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)
